2603.17470.title: VirPro: Visual-referred Probabilistic Prompt Learning for Weakly-Supervised Monocular 3D Detection
2603.17470.paper_summary: Monocular 3D object detection typically relies on pseudo-labeling techniques to reduce dependency on real-world annotations. Recent advances demonstrate that deterministic linguistic cues can serve as effective auxiliary weak supervision signals, providing complementary semantic context. However, hand-crafted textual descriptions struggle to capture the inherent visual diversity of individuals across scenes, limiting the model's ability to learn scene-aware representations. To address this challenge, we propose Visual-referred Probabilistic Prompt Learning (VirPro), an adaptive multi-modal pretraining paradigm that can be seamlessly integrated into diverse weakly supervised monocular 3D detection frameworks. Specifically, we generate a diverse set of learnable, instance-conditioned prompts across scenes and store them in an Adaptive Prompt Bank (APB). Subsequently, we introduce Multi-Gaussian Prompt Modeling (MGPM), which incorporates scene-based visual features into the corresponding textual embeddings, allowing the text prompts to express visual uncertainties. Then, from the fused vision-language embeddings, we decode a prompt-targeted Gaussian, from which we derive a unified object-level prompt embedding for each instance. RoI-level contrastive matching is employed to enforce modality alignment, bringing embeddings of co-occurring objects within the same scene closer in the latent space, thus enhancing semantic coherence. Extensive experiments on the KITTI benchmark demonstrate that integrating our pretraining paradigm consistently yields substantial performance gains, achieving up to a 4.8% average precision improvement than the baseline.
2603.17470.paper_summary_zh: 單目 3D 物體檢測通常依賴於偽標記技術，以減少對現實世界標註的依賴。最近的進展顯示，確定性的語言提示可以作為有效的輔助弱監督信號，提供互補的語義上下文。然而，手工製作的文本描述難以捕捉場景中個體固有的視覺多樣性，限制了模型學習場景感知表示的能力。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了視覺參考的概率提示學習（VirPro），這是一種自適應的多模態預訓練範式，可以無縫整合到各種弱監督的單目 3D 檢測框架中。具體而言，我們在場景中生成一組多樣的可學習、實例條件提示，並將其存儲在自適應提示庫（APB）中。隨後，我們引入多高斯提示建模（MGPM），將基於場景的視覺特徵納入相應的文本嵌入中，使文本提示能夠表達視覺不確定性。然後，從融合的視覺-語言嵌入中，我們解碼一個針對提示的高斯，從中為每個實例導出統一的物體級提示嵌入。採用 RoI 級對比匹配來強化模態對齊，使同一場景中共現物體的嵌入在潛在空間中更接近，從而增強語義一致性。在 KITTI 基準上進行的廣泛實驗表明，整合我們的預訓練範式始終能帶來顯著的性能提升，平均精度提高了高達 4.8% 相較於基線。
2603.17470.author: Chupeng Liu et.al.
2603.17470.authors: Chupeng Liu, Jiyong Rao, Shangquan Sun, Runkai Zhao, Weidong Cai
